# FW Blog

> A personal blog about web development and technology

## About

This is FW's personal blog about web development and technology.

Website: https://imfw.io
RSS Feed: https://imfw.io/feed.xml

## Navigation

- Home: https://imfw.io/

## All Tags


## Technology Stack

- Static Site Generator: 11ty (Eleventy)
- CSS Framework: Tailwind CSS
- Syntax Highlighting: Prism.js (One Dark theme)
- Deployment: GitHub Pages
